selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including textbooks, notebooks, folders/worksheets, pencil/marker holders... storage bins and paper trays without clutter."
selections.style_notes: Organized teacher workstation; keep tidy and functional (3–5 items, stacked/in trays).
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: paper tray with worksheets, teacher notebook/gradebook, pencil/marker holder. Optional: folder stack, stapler, coffee mug

selections.prompt_constraints: No specific requirements for this surface (supports general school supplies mentioned in prompt). No specific manipulands required.
selections.style_notes: Lightly dressed; 1–3 small items max so it reads as storage, not clutter.
selections.suggested_items: Optional: extra folders, small stack of worksheets, sticky notes, spare pens/highlighters on top

selections.prompt_constraints: The board marker and whiteboard eraser must be separate visible physical objects.
selections.style_notes: Student-ready and tidy; keep the marker and eraser together at the rear edge nearest the board while preserving clear writing space.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: notebook, pencil, dry-erase board marker, whiteboard eraser. Optional: water bottle

selections.prompt_constraints: Use separate folder and worksheet objects so each required category remains independently auditable.
selections.style_notes: Keep stacks aligned; no sprawling papers into aisles.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: textbook, one folder, one separate worksheet. Optional: ruler

selections.style_notes: Compact school supplies; avoid tall items that block sightlines.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: worksheet/folder, pencil/marker holder (small cup or pencil case). Optional: eraser

selections.style_notes: One bottle only; keep clear writing space.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: notebook, water bottle. Optional: textbook

selections.style_notes: Small flat items only; keep surface mostly open.
Art-capable desk; keep tools neatly placed (closed scissors).
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: glue stick, scissors. Optional: scrap paper/worksheet

selections.prompt_constraints: Keep the paper tray and storage caddy distinct; markers must be separate visible objects rather than only a holder label.
selections.style_notes: Art station: grouped in a caddy/bin; avoid excessive clutter or spills.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: construction paper, worksheet, separate colored classroom markers, glue, scissors, small storage bin/caddy, and one paper tray. Optional: crayons/colored pencils

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt requires books, storage bins, folders/worksheets and backpacks. Keep backpacks fully inside lower cubbies so no floor target or aisle clutter is needed.
selections.style_notes: Organized classroom storage; readable labels, not overpacked.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: mixed books/textbooks, labeled storage bins, backpacks and folders/worksheets in separate cubbies. Optional: spare notebooks
